name: Uncle Ben's Classic Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Uncle Ben's Converted brand rice
2 egg yolks beaten OR 1/2 cup eggbeaters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice and water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes, or until the rice is very tender and most of the water has been absorbed.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Add milk along with the sugar mixture to the rice.
4. If desired, add raisins at this point.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
6. Remove from heat. Stir in butter and vanilla extract.
7. Slowly stir about 1 cup of the hot rice mixture into the beaten egg yolks or eggbeaters in a bowl.
8. Add the remaining mixture back to the saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture starts to bubble.
9. Remove from heat immediately and pour into a serving dish. Serve plain or with cinnamon, nutmeg, whipped cream, etc.
This recipe serves 5 (or more if you truly love creamy rice pudding).
